message:
feat(fcp-core/capability): typestate split for instance-binding (br-jkcka.3)

Adds the BoundVerified + UnboundVerified marker types and the
verify_bound / verify_unbound / promote_with_instance methods per
ADR docs/architecture/adr/jkcka-typestate-split.md.

Added ADDITIVELY (legacy verify() + CryptographicallyVerified stay
for now to avoid workspace-wide churn; jkcka.4 migrates call sites).
This unlocks new code to pick the right enforcement variant at
compile time without breaking existing builds.

API additions:
- `BoundVerified` / `UnboundVerified` phantom marker types
- `AnyVerified: Sealed` trait (unifies state-agnostic helpers;
  sealed so external crates cannot widen the verified-marker surface)
- `CapabilityVerifier::verify_bound` — returns `CapabilityToken<BoundVerified>`;
  refuses verifiers constructed via `without_instance_binding`
- `CapabilityVerifier::verify_unbound` — returns `CapabilityToken<UnboundVerified>`;
  refuses verifiers constructed via `::new` (bound constructor)
- `CapabilityToken<UnboundVerified>::promote_with_instance(&InstanceId)`
  — gateway→connector handoff; equality-checks claim's instance_id
  against the connector's self-reported id, returns
  `CapabilityToken<BoundVerified>` on success
- `CapabilityToken<BoundVerified>::claims()` and
  `CapabilityToken<UnboundVerified>::claims_unbound()` accessors

Runtime regression tests (6 new, all green):
- verify_bound_requires_instance_binding_verifier (constructor mode mismatch refused)
- verify_unbound_requires_unbinding_verifier (other direction refused)
- verify_bound_with_matching_instance_produces_bound_token (happy path)
- verify_unbound_produces_unbound_token (happy path)
- promote_with_instance_correct_id_returns_bound (handoff happy path)
- promote_with_instance_wrong_id_returns_error (handoff sad path → ZoneViolation)

Unblocks jkcka.4 (migrate downstream consumers), jkcka.6 (trybuild
compile-fail tests), jkcka.7 (docs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
